rulings.Case Title: RAMU AKI ET AL VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF RAMU AKI, DIANE BEST, RAYMOND BUCKLEY, and SHARON BUTLER's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order.= (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: GRACE BIGLER ET AL VS. SHUIMU HUANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT SHUIMU HUANG and QING YE's Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And Set Aside Default GRANTED. Defendant must pay all costs and attorney's fees incurred by Plaintiffs to date no later than 30 days from the date of the order. Counsel for Plaintiffs to prepare order. = (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: EDELMIRA LUNA VS. LISA BURLESON PEGUESE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF EDELMIRA LUNA's Motion To Amend Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Complaint must be filed and served forthwith.= (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW PASQUINI VS. EMPRESS EXPRESS, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT MIU LEE, VALERIE LEE, DARREN LEE, and EMPRESS EXPRESS, INC.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to causes of action for Failure to Refund Security Deposit per CC 1950.5(g)(1), Negligent and Intentional Violation of Statutory Duty, Violation of SFRO 37.10B - these causes of action are barred by the applicable statutes of limitations per CCP 338 and CCP 340. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to fraud cause of action for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts in support of every element of delayed discovery. Motion is otherwise denied as the arguments as to the remaining causes of action subject to this motion are in part based on unpled affirmative defense.= (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: MATTHEW PASQUINI VS. EMPRESS EXPRESS, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Answer To First Amended Complaint/ Defendants' Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT MIU LEE, VALERIE LEE, DARREN LEE, and EMPRESS EXPRESS, INC.'s Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer To First Amended Complaint OFF CALENDAR. Motion has not been served on all parties to this action, specifically Hung Lee; counsel of record Utrecht & Lenvin, LLP. See Proof of Service filed on February 2, 2017. = (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CIARA RONDONE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Permanently Restrict The Register Of Actions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT CIARA RONDONE's Motion To Permanently Restrict The Register Of Actions DENIED. Moving party fails to meet the burden under CRC 2.550.= (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY KIM VS. MARIA REYES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT MARIA CASTELLON's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. The motion is not set in accordance with C.C.P. 418.10(a) and 1167.4.= (501/AC)

rulings.Case Title: RITZ FLORES VS. JAVIAR MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 9, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT JAVIER MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The complaint is not uncertain, the Unlawful Detainer cause of action is sufficiently alleged, and there is no misjoinder of parties.= (501/AC)
